'''âh-r-v-v''' ('''kaharvevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hockle|hockle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-r-v-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hockle|hockle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âh-r-v-v
|-
! Lemma
| kaharvevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiharvevoko|thiharvevoko]] || [[word:jiharvevoko|jiharvevoko]] || [[word:shiharvevoko|shiharvevoko]] || [[word:kiharvevoko|kiharvevoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
